'''thayuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featherbone|featherbone]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-y-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featherbone|featherbone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thayuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæyijith|thæyijith]] || [[word:thæyijij|thæyijij]] || [[word:thæyijish|thæyijish]] || [[word:thæyiji|thæyiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thayuyujuth|thayuyujuth]] || [[word:thayuyujuj|thayuyujuj]] || [[word:thayuyujush|thayuyujush]] || [[word:thayuyuju|thayuyuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayujuth|thayujuth]] || [[word:thayujuj|thayujuj]] || [[word:thayujush|thayujush]] || [[word:thayuju|thayuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayufjuth|thayufjuth]] || [[word:thayufjuj|thayufjuj]] || [[word:thayufjush|thayufjush]] || [[word:thayufjuf|thayufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thayujuthu|thayujuthu]] || [[word:thayujuju|thayujuju]] || [[word:thayujushu|thayujushu]] || [[word:thayujuku|thayujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thayujuth|thayujuth]] || [[word:thayujuj|thayujuj]] || [[word:thayujush|thayujush]] || [[word:thayuju|thayuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thayujuthul|thayujuthul]] || [[word:thayujujul|thayujujul]] || [[word:thayujushul|thayujushul]] || [[word:thayujukul|thayujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thayujuthuthu|thayujuthuthu]] || [[word:thayujujuju|thayujujuju]] || [[word:thayujushushu|thayujushushu]] || [[word:thayujuku|thayujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thayujuthun|thayujuthun]] || [[word:thayujujun|thayujujun]] || [[word:thayujushun|thayujushun]] || [[word:thayujukun|thayujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thayujuthuoro|thayujuthuoro]] || [[word:thayujujuoro|thayujujuoro]] || [[word:thayujushuoro|thayujushuoro]] || [[word:thayujukuoro|thayujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
